description: Return to your basics and play around your style statement with this pair of canvas shoes from basics. A perfect blend of style and comfort with its contrast coloured laces, this sneaker makes for a great buy. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Eyelets on the medial midfoot for breathable comfort Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Padded footbed with a fabric lining for cushioning and all-day comfort Haul loop for easy on/off and to hang shoes Midsole EVA midsole for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains Shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
